html:
A Pumpkin is an uncommon Vegetable that can be Farmed from Farm Plots by planting Seeds for a 11% chance of growing or using Pumpkin Seeds (Sharp Seeds). It can be used as an ingredient in several Crock Pot recipes, particularly Pumpkin Cookies. Feeding a Pumpkin to a Bird in a Birdcage will produce 1–2 Pumpkin Seeds, and half the time 1 regular Seeds. In Don't Starve Together, you will always get 1 Pumpkin Seed. It can also be combined with Fireflies (caught with a net) to create a Pumpkin Lantern.

Hot Pumpkin

Hot Pumpkin is a Vegetable food item made by Cooking a Pumpkin at a Campfire, Fire Pit, or a Dwarf Star. It restores more than double the health of its raw counterpart. It can also be used as an ingredient in several Crock Pot recipes.

Usage

×2

Using more than two Sweeteners may result in Taffy.

Gallery

  • Original HD pumpkin icon from Bonus Materials from CD Don't Starve.
  • Original HD pumpkin cooked icon from Bonus Materials from CD Don't Starve.
  • Icon used as emoji for Official Klei Discord.
By TypeBy Crock Pot Value

Miscellaneous
"pumpkin"
“It's as big as my head!”
–Wilson, when examining a Pumpkin.
“I wonder what would happen if I applied fire.”
–Willow, when examining a Pumpkin.
“Is big as head of weakling man! Not Wolfgang head.”
–Wolfgang, when examining a Pumpkin.
“It's as big as the hole where my heart was.”
–Wendy, when examining a Pumpkin.
“IT HAS A PLEASING SHAPE”
–WX-78, when examining a Pumpkin.
“Cucurbita pepo.”
–Wickerbottom, when examining a Pumpkin.
“I don't like to eat things that grow on the ground.”
–Woodie, when examining a Pumpkin.
“Hallowe'en was always my favorite.”
–Maxwell, when examining a Pumpkin.
“I predict it will make for an excellent lantern.”
–Wagstaff, when examining a Pumpkin.
“It might make a gööd bludgeön, at least.”
–Wigfrid, when examining a Pumpkin.
“That's a huge pumpkin!”
–Webber, when examining a Pumpkin.
“You look nice today, pumpkin.”
–Walani, when examining a Pumpkin.
“I'm the pumpking of the world!”
–Warly, when examining a Pumpkin.
“Would make a good cannon ball.”
–Woodlegs, when examining a Pumpkin.
“'TIS VEGGIE O' ORANGE”
–Wilba, when examining a Pumpkin.
“Good for belly”
–Wormwood, when examining a Pumpkin.
“And it's not even fall! Or is it?”
–Wheeler, when examining a Pumpkin.
“Hey there, pumpkin.”
–Winona, when examining a Pumpkin.
“How nice and how spooky!”
–Wortox, when examining a Pumpkin.
“Lumpy and good, florp!”
–Wurt, when examining a Pumpkin.
“Is it Fall already?”
–Walter, when examining a Pumpkin.
“A pumpkin that size should keep me fed for a while.”
–Wanda, when examining a Pumpkin.
A Pumpkin is an uncommon Vegetable that can be Farmed from Farm Plots by planting Seeds for a 11% chance of growing or using Pumpkin Seeds (Sharp Seeds). It can be used as an ingredient in several Crock Pot recipes, particularly Pumpkin Cookies. Feeding a Pumpkin to a Bird in a Birdcage will produce 1–2 Pumpkin Seeds, and half the time 1 regular Seeds. In Don't Starve Together, you will always get 1 Pumpkin Seed. It can also be combined with Fireflies (caught with a net) to create a Pumpkin Lantern.

Miscellaneous
"pumpkin_cooked"
“How did it not turn into a pie?”
–Wilson, when examining a Hot Pumpkin.
“Fire on the outside turned out pretty well.”
–Willow, when examining a Hot Pumpkin.
“I cook your head, puny man! I am strongest Wolfgang.”
–Wolfgang, when examining a Hot Pumpkin.
“It shriveled a tiny bit from the heat. I like that.”
–Wendy, when examining a Hot Pumpkin.
“DELICIOUS”
–WX-78, when examining a Hot Pumpkin.
“Cooked Cucurbita pepo. Gooey and delicious.”
–Wickerbottom, when examining a Hot Pumpkin.
“Pies are good.”
–Woodie, when examining a Hot Pumpkin.
“A little more refined, at least.”
–Maxwell, when examining a Hot Pumpkin.
“A bit of cooked vegetable is good for the constitution.”
–Wagstaff, when examining a Hot Pumpkin.
“Piping höt örange mush.”
–Wigfrid, when examining a Hot Pumpkin.
“It's all warm now.”
–Webber, when examining a Hot Pumpkin.
“Smells autumn-y.”
–Walani, when examining a Hot Pumpkin.
“Could use pie crust and nutmeg...”
–Warly, when examining a Hot Pumpkin.
“Me ships cook used to add a dash o' cinnamon.”
–Woodlegs, when examining a Hot Pumpkin.
“FWOOSH'D VEGGIE O' ORANGE”
–Wilba, when examining a Hot Pumpkin.
“Slurpy”
–Wormwood, when examining a Hot Pumpkin.
“Gives off the smell of fresh jack-o-lantern.”
–Wheeler, when examining a Hot Pumpkin.
“Not bad! Kind of sweet.”
–Winona, when examining a Hot Pumpkin.
“Slightly easier on my impish tum.”
–Wortox, when examining a Hot Pumpkin.
“Squishy!”
–Wurt, when examining a Hot Pumpkin.
“Hot, mushy pumpkin guts.”
–Walter, when examining a Hot Pumpkin.
“I don't know why I bothered cooking it.”
–Wanda, when examining a Hot Pumpkin.
Hot Pumpkin is a Vegetable food item made by Cooking a Pumpkin at a Campfire, Fire Pit, or a Dwarf Star. It restores more than double the health of its raw counterpart. It can also be used as an ingredient in several Crock Pot recipes.

A '''Pumpkin''' is an uncommon [[Vegetable]] that can be [[Farming|Farmed]] from [[Farm Plot]]s by planting [[Seeds]] for a 11% chance of growing or using [[Pumpkin Seeds]] (Sharp Seeds). It can be used as an ingredient in several [[Crock Pot]] recipes, particularly [[Pumpkin Cookies]]. Feeding a Pumpkin to a [[Bird]] in a [[Birdcage]] will produce 1–2 Pumpkin Seeds, and half the time 1 regular Seeds. In [[Don't Starve Together]], you will always get 1 [[Pumpkin Seeds|Pumpkin Seed]]. It can also be combined with [[Fireflies]] (caught with a net) to create a [[Pumpkin Lantern]].
{{Clear}}

'''Hot Pumpkin''' is a Vegetable [[food]] item made by [[Cooking]] a Pumpkin at a [[Campfire]], [[Fire Pit]], or a [[Star Caller's Staff|Dwarf Star]]. It restores more than double the [[health]] of its raw counterpart. It can also be used as an ingredient in several Crock Pot recipes.
{{clear}}
== {{pic|32|Icon Tools}} Usage ==
{{Recipe
|item   = Pumpkin
|fire   = yes
|result = Hot Pumpkin
}}
{{Recipe
|item   = Pumpkin
|bird   = yes
|result = Pumpkin Seeds
}}
{{Recipe
|item   = Pumpkins
|manure = yes
|result = Manure
}}
{{Recipe
|item1  = Pumpkin
|item2  = Fireflies
|result = Pumpkin Lantern
|Science 2 = yes}}
{{Recipe
|item1  = Pumpkins
|item2  = Sweetener
|count2 = 2
|item3  = Filler
|pot    = yes
|result = Pumpkin Cookies
|note   = Using more than two Sweeteners may result in [[Taffy]].
}}
{{clear}}
